list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT asset FROM pca_signals ORDER BY asset

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Signals" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / COUNT(*)::numeric, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Win %" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total bps" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Peak" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND peak_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}')

SELECT direction AS "Direction", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY direction ORDER BY direction

SELECT COALESCE(exit_reason, 'unknown') AS "Reason", COUNT(*)::float AS "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT COALESCE(exit_reason, 'unknown') AS "Exit Reason", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total (bps)", COUNT(*) AS "N" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY AVG(pnl_bps) DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN (market_context->>'funding')::numeric < -0.0001 THEN 'very neg (<-1bp)' WHEN (market_context->>'funding')::numeric < 0 THEN 'slightly neg' WHEN (market_context->>'funding')::numeric < 0.0001 THEN 'slightly pos' ELSE 'very pos (>1bp)' END AS "Funding Bucket", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", COUNT(*) AS "N" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND market_context IS NOT NULL AND market_context->>'funding' IS NOT NULL AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN((market_context->>'funding')::numeric)

SELECT CASE WHEN pc1_displacement_bps IS NULL THEN 'no data' WHEN pc1_displacement_bps < -50 THEN '< -50 bps' WHEN pc1_displacement_bps < -25 THEN '-50 to -25' WHEN pc1_displacement_bps < 0 THEN '-25 to 0' WHEN pc1_displacement_bps < 25 THEN '0 to 25' WHEN pc1_displacement_bps < 50 THEN '25 to 50' ELSE '> 50 bps' END AS "PC1 Bucket", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", COUNT(*) AS "N" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(COALESCE(pc1_displacement_bps, -9999))

SELECT date_trunc('day', to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000)) AS time, direction AS metric, ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY time

SELECT date_trunc('day', to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000)) AS time, direction AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY time

SELECT asset AS "Asset", COUNT(*) AS "Signals", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total (bps)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Win %", ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Peak", ROUND(AVG(trough_pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Trough", ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold (min)", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN exit_reason = 'trailing_stop' THEN pnl_bps END)::numeric, 2) AS "TS Avg", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'trailing_stop') AS "TS Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${direction}' = 'All' OR direction = '${direction}') GROUP BY asset HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY SUM(pnl_bps) DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(pc1_displacement_bps, 0) >= 25 THEN 'counter-trend' ELSE 'with-trend' END AS "PC1 Filter", CASE WHEN market_context IS NOT NULL AND (market_context->>'funding')::numeric < 0 THEN 'neg funding' ELSE 'pos/no funding' END AS "Funding Filter", COUNT(*) AS "Signals", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Win %", ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND direction = 'short' AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY AVG(pnl_bps) DESC

SELECT direction AS "Direction", COUNT(*) AS "Signals", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg PnL (bps)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Win %", ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Peak", ROUND(AVG(trough_pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Trough", ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold (min)", ROUND(STDDEV(pnl_bps)::numeric, 2) AS "StdDev (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND direction IN ('short', 'random_short') AND to_timestamp("timestamp" / 1000) BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = '${asset}') GROUP BY direction ORDER BY direction
